nasb.text: For in this way in former times the holy women also, who hoped in God, used to adorn themselves, being submissive to their own husbands;

esv.text: For this is how the holy women who hoped in God used to adorn themselves, by submitting to their own husbands,

cnv.text: 因為古時仰望　神的聖潔婦女，正是這樣裝飾自己，順服丈夫，

ccb.text: 从前那些仰赖上帝的圣洁妇女，都是以这些来妆饰自己，并顺服自己的丈夫，

csbs.text: 实际上，从前盼望神的那些圣洁妇女，也是这样装饰自己，服从自己丈夫的；
